name: IMPERIAL OIL LTD
business: Imperial Oil is an integrated oil company that explores for, produces, refines, and markets crude oil, natural gas, and petroleum products, and also manufactures petrochemicals. It also pursues lower-emission business opportunities.

exposures.sentence: The company is one of Canada s largest integrated oil companies. It is active in all phases of the petroleum industry in Canada, including the exploration for, and production and sale of, crude oil and natural gas.
In Canada, it is a major producer of petrochemicals.
The company also pursues lower-emission business opportunities including carbon capture and storage, hydrogen, lower-emission fuels, and lithium.

catalysts.event: First oil production from Leming SAGD project
catalysts.sentence: Development activities commenced in 2023 and first oil production was achieved in November 2025.
The Enhanced Bitumen Recovery Technology (EBRT) field pilot on the Aspen lease received funding approval in 2023, with development work underway for pilot start-up anticipated by 2027.
In 2026, a development drilling program is planned within the approved development area to add productive capacity.
The program is expected to reduce employee roles by approximately 20% and to be substantially completed by the end of 2027.
Environmental expenditures are expected to increase to approximately $2.0 billion in 2026, with capital expenditures expected to account for approximately 48 percent of the total.
